vocab.meaning: tình trạng tắc nghẽn hoàn toàn/đình trệ
vocab.example: When the city hits a total deadlock, I usually find a way to distract myself rather than getting frustrated.

vocab.meaning: mở và lắng nghe một chương trình podcast
vocab.example: To make the most of the idle time, I often tune into a podcast to catch up on the latest industry news.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng ùn tắc giao thông (kẻ ô)
vocab.example: During severe gridlock, I find that listening to lo-fi music helps maintain my composure.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh thản/bình tâm trong tâm hồn
vocab.example: I practice deep breathing exercises to preserve my inner tranquility while surrounded by honking cars.

vocab.meaning: thời gian chết không sinh lời/vô ích
vocab.example: I try to transform that unproductive downtime into a mobile learning session by practicing a foreign language.

vocab.meaning: tự tay chọn lọc/biên soạn một danh sách nhạc
vocab.example: I usually curate a specific playlist of upbeat songs to ward off the boredom of a slow-moving commute.

vocab.meaning: sự nhẩm lại/tổng duyệt trong đầu
vocab.example: If I'm stuck on the way to a meeting, I use the time for a mental rehearsal of my upcoming presentation.

vocab.meaning: điểm nghẽn giao thông (nút thắt cổ chai)
vocab.example: Whenever I anticipate a bottleneck at the main intersection, I prepare myself for at least twenty minutes of waiting.
The standstill gives me a rare moment to contemplate my long-term goals and reflect on the day's events.
It is essential to keep my cool in heavy traffic to avoid the pitfalls of road rage.
